hero.badge: 20+ years moving travellers in the Riviera Maya
hero.title: Private transportation in Cancún, done right.
hero.subtitle: Door-to-door private transfers across Cancún and the Riviera Maya — comfortable, safe and always on time.

otherTab.title: Multiple stops & rentals
otherTab.body: Travelling to more than one place, or staying at a vacation rental? Build a custom multi-stop route with us.

services.title: Transportation services in Cancún & the Riviera Maya
services.body: We provide high-quality private transfers across Cancún and the Riviera Maya. Our goal is a comfortable, safe and hassle-free journey from the moment you land until you are back at the airport.

props.title: Safe & certified
props.body: Licensed vehicles, professional bilingual drivers and travel insurance on every ride.

props.title: On time, every time
props.body: We track your flight, so we are there waiting — even if your plane is early or late.

props.title: No hidden fees
props.body: The price you see includes taxes. Free cancellation and changes on most bookings.

assist.title: Need assistance?
assist.body: Our team answers 24/7 in English & Spanish.

checkout.commentsPh: Anything we should know? Car seat age, extra luggage…
checkout.oneTerminal: My party arrives at one terminal
checkout.twoTerminals: My party arrives at two terminals
checkout.payNote: After your purchase you will receive an email with payment confirmation and detailed pick-up instructions.

confirmation.title: Booking confirmed!
confirmation.subtitle: You will receive an email with your transfer details.

footer.blurb: Private airport transfers and tours across Cancún and the Riviera Maya. Member of Alianza Nacional de Transportadoras Turísticas.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: 20+ years providing premium transfers in Cancún and the Riviera Maya
about.history: Founded over 20 years ago, Cancún Transfer Hotels has become one of the most trusted transfer companies in the Riviera Maya. Our certified bilingual drivers, modern fleet, and real-time flight monitoring ensure every guest receives a comfortable, safe, and punctual experience.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

validation.acceptTerms: You must accept the terms and conditions
validation.futureDate: Date must be in the future
